name: @erfianugrah/pi-loop
description: Sensor-gated, self-correcting loop driver for pi. Language-agnostic: drives a fresh `pi -p` each iteration until deterministic sensors (build/lint/test/typecheck/e2e) pass. Ships a governor (model-escalation ladder, git checkpoint/rollback, write-scope) and a dependency-free headless-Chromium sensor.
author: Erfi Anugrah
